Hi, I'm Sylvia Zhou.

Master's student at UIUC specializing in Information Management. Passionate about bridging the gap between complex data, AI technologies, and intuitive user experiences.

Work Experience

Forward Deployed Engineer & Senior Consultant

H60 Consulting, AI-Powered System Team

January 2025 - Present

Champaign, Illinois

  • •Led the end-to-end design and development of Compass, an enterprise AI compliance chatbot transforming complex aviation regulations into intuitive, pilot-facing insights.
  • •Unified business, design, and engineering teams to translate regulatory pain points into a scalable full-stack solution spanning data processing, AI retrieval logic, and conversational UX.
  • •Architected the system’s core AI workflow using retrieval-augmented generation (RAG) and compliance reasoning modules, enabling accurate, explainable responses to pilot queries.
  • •Designed the product interface and interaction flow to ensure seamless usability across devices, integrating user feedback loops into each release cycle.
  • •Delivered a production-ready MVP that automated contract interpretation and regulatory validation, reducing manual review time by 45% and improving operational transparency.

Product Analyst Intern

Poizon, Merchant Experience Team

May 2023 - August 2023

Shanghai, China

  • •Conducted user journey mapping and funnel analysis for 180+ merchants to identify drop-off points in the onboarding and promotion process, revealing key UX friction and feature gaps.
  • •Designed and A/B tested revised onboarding flows that simplified page hierarchy and interaction logic, reducing merchant setup time by 18% and improving completion rate.
  • •Collaborated with product and engineering teams to redesign the seller dashboard, introducing visibility metrics and actionable prompts that drove a 15% increase in average revenue per merchant.
  • •Created a real-time analytics dashboard to monitor activation, engagement, and churn, allowing the team to prioritize product iterations based on behavioral data.
  • •Synthesized quantitative insights and qualitative feedback into weekly reports that informed PMs’ roadmap decisions and improved coordination across business and tech teams.

Featured Projects

UIPathFinder

Full-Stack Product Lead

AI-Powered Campus Day Planner

August 2024 - December 2024
  • •Led a four-member team to build UIPathFinder, a full-stack AI application that plans students’ daily routes and activities using class schedules, GIS, and weather data.
  • •Designed the data pipeline and AI planning module integrating LLM reasoning with predictive analytics to recommend personalized itineraries and adaptive campus routes.
  • •Developed the frontend with React and Next.js, implementing interactive maps and real-time route updates connected to live occupancy and weather feeds.
  • •Conducted usability testing with 40+ students and iterated algorithms and UX flows, improving recommendation accuracy and user experience.
